startup_commands.label: demo-start
startup_commands.notes: Installs dependencies, runs smoke checks, starts the local API and client, and opens the main demo routes.

smoke_commands.label: demo-smoke
smoke_commands.notes: Validates core fixture and contract integrity before UI-specific validation.

surfaces.notes: Vocabulary feed and clustering review surface.
YouTube overlay and subtitle augmentation surface.

debug_hooks.name: sessionLogger
debug_hooks.usage: Use window.sessionLogger.getCurrent(), getAll(), export(), and clear() during browser-backed runs.

debug_hooks.name: hangoutUseChat
debug_hooks.usage: Trace useChat, toolQueue, processingRef, and continue flow when investigating interaction/state bugs.

notes: Focus on the first-time hint state and the early multi-character Block Crush step.
Prefer direct before/after screenshots over timing traces unless the exercise state itself becomes ambiguous.
Expected behavior: a player may tap once to finish the typewriter effect and again to advance.
Bug behavior: the UI appears ready to advance, the tap lands, but no meaningful state transition happens.
Capture transition evidence, not a single still frame.
Regression target: the stale Block Crush board never becomes visible after completion.
Distinguish transport-level streaming from user-visible progressive rendering.
Capture timestamps for request start, first visible dialogue, incremental updates, and completion.
Treat this as a timing-sensitive reviewer-proof workflow issue.
Require temporal capture and screenshots in validation and fix verification outputs.
Prefer qa-platform docs and workflow assets; keep cross-lane changes minimal.

steps: Open the Block Crush dev exercise in a mobile viewport.
Capture the first-entry state and verify whether the objective is understandable without extra explanation.
Capture an early multi-character gameplay state and check whether the density and distractors feel manageable.
screenshot_targets: hint or tutorial state if present

steps: Open the fresh onboarding flow and progress through Tong intro until the profile/language settings step is visible.
Capture the language selection UI before changing any controls.
Test whether a player can clearly tell what each control means and whether all three languages are forced.
Open the first hangout scene.
Capture the initial whisper and empty-space composition.
Verify the discoverability of Tong whisper and the continue affordance.
Open the Block Crush dev exercise.
Capture the lives indicator and active gameplay state.
Check whether the time or pressure state is visually understandable.
Open a hangout and leave the HUD closed initially.
Capture whether the pull tab is obvious without prior instruction.
Open the HUD and capture the charge meter and XP/SP/RP labels.
Open the main game surfaces in a mobile viewport.
Capture text-heavy states including dialogue, whisper, and HUD.
Verify whether text and touch targets remain comfortably readable.
Open a hangout scene with Korean text visible.
Tap CJK words and verify whether the interaction is consistent.
Capture examples of bare romanization or non-tappable CJK if found.
Open the first hangout scene in QA mode.
Progress until a continue affordance is visible and reproduce the wasted tap if possible.
Export session logs and state snapshots immediately after any tap that appears to do nothing.
Distinguish expected typewriter skip from a genuine no-op continue tap.
Open the Act 2 intro and progress until a Block Crush exercise completes.
Use burst screenshots or screen recording during the review-overlay dismissal.
Confirm whether the stale game board appears between the review overlay and the parent fade.
Open the first hangout scene in QA mode.
Capture request start, loading pulse, first visible dialogue, and the completion of the visible text.
Confirm whether the on-screen dialogue is progressively rendered or arrives as a complete payload after a gap.
Run the strict local API flow against the current branch.
Confirm the server persists a checkpoint after a hangout turn and that a later start-or-resume reuses it.
Record the command transcript and the resumed checkpoint state markers.
screenshot_targets: optional /game bootstrap sanity frame if a browser pass is included

steps: Run the strict local API flow with scenarioSeedId assertions enabled.
Confirm start-or-resume returns resumeSource=scenario_seed and lands on the deterministic review checkpoint.
Record the command transcript and seed-specific checkpoint markers.
screenshot_targets: optional seeded /game review-state frame if a browser pass is included

steps: Run the strict local API flow with progression persistence assertions enabled.
Confirm mission gate, unlock, and reward snapshots persist into the resumed checkpoint.
Record the command transcript and the persisted progression markers.
screenshot_targets: optional /game bootstrap sanity frame if a browser pass is included

steps: Generate the codex cloud queue prompt for erniesg/tong#46.
Validate the task prompt includes timing-sensitive evidence requirements and reviewer-visible media guidance.
Verify lane routing points to qa-platform with explicit docs paths.
screenshot_targets: task prompt excerpt showing evidence requirements
task prompt excerpt showing reviewer-visible media requirement
